source_meta.source_document: Triathlon Knee System Surgical Protocol Compend

systems.system_notes: Primary total knee arthroplasty platform with standard, express, MIS and single-use instrumentation pathways.

trays.tray_notes: Standard instruments section is explicitly listed in the surgical protocol compend.
Tibial preparation and tray addendum is explicitly listed in the surgical protocol compend.

components.component_notes: Femoral component compatibility is described in the surgical protocol compend.
Tibial baseplate compatibility includes cemented, universal, beaded and Tritanium options.
Insert compatibility includes CR, CS, PS, PSR and TS options.
Patella compatibility includes asymmetric and symmetric patella options.
Distal and posterior femoral augments are listed in the surgical protocol compend.
Tibial augments are listed in the surgical protocol compend.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Femoral component, patella and tibial insert/baseplate compatibility tables are present but not fully expanded into SKU-level implant rows.
unresolved_items.reason: SKU-level implant catalogue rows need deeper source parsing from the compend or IFU set.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Compatibility tables identify component families but not a full final SKU list in this extraction pass.
